final:
// // This comment suggests that the clock gating circuit will enable the clock signal whenever either 'en' or 'te' is asserted.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input en,
    input te,
    output reg en_clk
);always @(*) begin
    if (en && te) begin
        en_clk = clk;
    end
    else begin
        en_clk = 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
